programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.
Fruit and Nuts. Animated series. Tired of eating grass, Shaun sets out to pinch one of the Farmer's prized apples, only to have every attempt ruined by his accomplice.
The Inventor Preventer. Animated series. Danger Mouse and Penfold must stop a deranged Victorian time-travelling chimp from uninventing the world.
The Merhaven Song Contest. The heroes quest to collect bath sponges from Merhaven, but Hoofius decides to enter the annual Merhaven Song Contest, causing mayhem in Merhaven.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Monster Butt. Girl enters a cosplay costume contest to win a trophy and meet her favourite TV star, but needs somebody to wear the back end of her enormous costume.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Great Wall Disco. Grizzy and the Lemmings discover a hidden mechanism on the Great Wall of China.
Shopping List. SpongeBob and Sandy collect Krabby Patty ingredients.
Swamps 'N' Gators. The Odd Squad investigate strange events. Olive and Otto get trapped inside a board game.
The Abominable Showman. JJ is torn between Blamjitsu with the yeti and helping the Dinmakers write a school song.
No Sweat! Danny and Mick get all hot and bothered as they attempt to build a new sauna!
You Built a Mega Slide. What would it take to build a slide so big that it went to the other side of the world?
...Science: States of Matter. Learn about solids, liquids and gas, heating and cooling, and the water cycle.
Episode 2. Dr Chris and Dr Xand learn about space. They find out about meteorites, and what happens when they land on Earth.
Experiments in Space. Dr Maggie reveals how experiments in space are helping us on Earth and in space.
Rot Box Results. A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.
Basking Shark. Steve Backshall learns about our very own gentle giant - the basking shark. It can be found in the UK's coastal waters every spring and summer.
Ear We Go! The doctors reveal how your eardrum works to enable you to hear, and they find out how tough it is to be hospital radio hosts.
Light, Sound and Electricity Special. Big Danny and Big Manny find science shocking, and Da Vinci does a sound experiment.
You Could Run at the Speed of Sound? A fun run goes wrong when one ambitious runner tries going at the speed of sound.
Science Den. Zoe from Oxfordshire is mad about science and desperately wants a den where she can pursue her passions and carry out noisy, messy experiments whenever she wants!
Observatory Den. Mark and Lauren get the help of experts to design dream dens for children. Helena needs a den to help her reach for the stars and fulfil her science dreams.
Record Breaker Kid. Odd Sock Aniya needs to break a planet record and Andy and the Band won't give up - even with Whiff trying to stop them!
Giant! Giant is pranked by Nitro when he appears as a guest of honour at a fake school award ceremony! The other Gladiators have sneaky fun backstage at Sheffield Arena.
Octonauts and the Baby Alligator Search. Preschool animation. Kwazii adopts a baby alligator, but when it escapes from the Octopod he must rescue the tiny creature from danger.
Personal Space. When Cosima finally finds a quiet place to read her book, she realises peace and quiet aren't all they're made out to be. Where's Big Lizard when she needs him?
Five Piris and a Little Egg. The Piris look after a special package for Shirley but get more than they bargained for.
Mojo Mountain. The heroes must urgently quest to Mojo Mountain and speak to the Silver Faun to prevent Hoofius from losing his mojo forever.
Forgotten Fungi. Trevor quests to solve the mystery of the faulty magical cakes. However, having fallen into the invisibility flour, how will he get everyone's attention?
A New Rug. Twin sisters ask the Ninjas to help them find them another flying rug to replace the one that they ripped, but it's Konpeki's pet snails who save the day.
Livin' on a Prayer. Reality-style drama series. With Sloane disqualified and Michelle injured, the team does not have enough dancers to dance in the final.

programmes.show_name: Blue Peter: World Book Day Takeover
programmes.show_description: World Book Day Takeover. Harry Potter's Weasley twins, James and Oliver Phelps, taste-test iconic foods from famous books to celebrate World Book Day.
Same But Different. Chelsey visits Keira's home, and seeing the life she could've had is all too much for her.
Episode 4. Stop-motion animation. Superhero Slippy Nana sort of saves a peach from a terrifying ordeal and Count Grape-ula strikes an unsuspecting victim.
Karma Farmer. Animated series. The Farmer transforms the farm into a chilled environment where work and chores are abolished and the animals are encouraged to express themselves.
Eventful Tentacles. An order mix-up leads to a delivery of hyperactive tentacles at Bash Street School. However, no-one wants the job of looking after the pesky things.
Spiky Trevor. Trevor accidentally spikes himself on a cactus while questing and discovers that being covered in spikes has given him a unique superpower.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Mildred the Bobblehead. Boy finds a rare Bobblehead in a bin.
The Legend of the Lemmings. The Lemmings create a shadow puppet show where seven papercut lemmings confront a bear.
Removals. Duck and Frog must move a famous pop star's possessions from one mansion to another. However, they are unable to do it with anything remaining in one piece.
Karen's Virus. Karen gets a computer virus.
Big Appetite in Little Tokyo. Shaggy is the victim of a curse that turns him into a monster each night as he sleeps.
Club 37. Ozzie and Orli try to solve just enough cases to access the exclusive clubs in HQ.
The Date. Robin poses as Speedy to sabotage his date with Starfire.
Friends as Two, Me and You. Roy and Ult must work together when they get caught in the Explorers' trap.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Interplanetary Cabin. A rocket carries the cabin into space.
Putting Down Roots. Mia and Lucy face their biggest game of the season, and buds Masai and Ernest get competitive. Spurs legend Sandro takes on Jayden in Skill Showdown.
Dynamite Rules! Dynamite sets Drs Dan and Raph an epic Body Battles task, and Billy becomes a mindbender.
Confession. Helmsworth demands answers from Switchblade.
Series 14 Preview. Dani Harmer promotes the new series of The Dumping Ground... and it's chaos!
This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.
Out of Order. Animated series. When the Farmer gets stuck in the loo, Bitzer has to get vital supplies to him as a matter of urgency.
Never Say Clever Again. Animated series. When all the other danger agents become supersmart due to a batch of genetically enhanced celery, Danger Mouse might need to find a new job.
Three Wishes. Blossom and Herbert accidentally use two of the Wishing Trident's wishes, so the heroes only have one wish left to use on their quest against a dragon.

programmes.show_description: Crimes Against the Family. Mum and Dad take the TV away until the kids learn to behave, and the siblings realise they need some rules.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Choco-Noodles. Grizzy creates a new Yummy-based recipe: choco-noodles.
Mustard O' Mine. The Krusty Krab runs out of mustard.
There Might Be Dragons. The Odd Squad investigate strange events. When the power goes out in the HQ, the Odd Squad must find a way to control the temperature of dragon eggs.
The Comedy Crown. The gang enter Pieface into a comedy contest to make him realise how funny he is.
Box Office Smash. Danny and Mick have to try and find a way out of Joy's office after accidentally getting locked in.
You Walked Through Walls. Wouldn't it be cool to be able to walk through walls? From turning into a gas to quantum trickery, we discover why it wouldn't be quite as useful as you'd like.
...Science: Changing Materials. Learn about comparing and grouping materials, reversible and irreversible changes, and choosing and using materials.
Episode 3. Dr Chris and Dr Xand learn about space. They find out all about the length of our days and how they are getting longer - and that it's all because of the moon.
Gamechangers. Dr Maggie explores the amazing game-changing missions of space with star guest, Nasa astronaut Kathy Sullivan. She also reveals her Top 5 Most Expensive Missions.
Decay and Bad Smells. A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.
Silky Shark. Steve Backshall encounters a seriously smooth shark. He dives with the silky shark in the wild, and gets under their smooth skin in his lab.
Bendy Cool Cartilage. The doctors reveal how important cartilage is to your body with the help of a suit of armour, and they find out what it takes to be a hospital porter.
Mary Ploppins, Magnets and Sorting Your Bits Out. Mary Ploppins soothes those digestive ills, Dr Big Brain tries banana power, and Einstein reacts to Tim Peake. Fred Sirieix guest stars.
You Could Teleport? Is it really possible to teleport? Spoiler alert: it could end in disaster!

programmes.show_name: Absolute Genius with Dick and Dom
programmes.show_description: Sir Isaac Newton. Dick and Dom reveal the genius of Sir Isaac Newton, one of the greatest scientists of all time, and explore his theories of gravity.

programmes.show_name: Absolute Genius with Dick and Dom
programmes.show_description: Brunel. Dick and Dom reveal the genius of engineer extraordinaire Isambard Kingdom Brunel and are inspired to come up with their own genius idea.
Screen Savers. Andy's mum has an Odd Job for the band - to stop the local cinema from being shut down. Trying to persuade councillor Hattie Hardface is tougher than they had bargained for.
Apollo! Nitro pranks Apollo with fake influencer Aubry Devonne Keep, causing a big splash! The other Gladiators have fun behind the scenes and pranking the audience at Sheffield Arena.
Octonauts and the Spinner Dolphins. Preschool animation. The Octonauts struggle to save a pod of spinner dolphins who seem to be swimming in their sleep.
A Place to Sleep. A playful Big Lizard accidentally breaks his own bath bed. Where will he sleep now?
The Dance Dispute. Pancake fumes when Nugget joins Dance Club and grabs the glory with his signature move.
The Smell of Victory. When the Fairy Squad get their wings gunked by Stinkweasel, the heroes must quest to end his reign of stinky nonsense over the forest.
Gnomes Might Fly. Priding herself on being the only flying hero, Twinkle is upset by Herbert's flying invention, and the pair risk a quest by being too competitive.
Trainee Witch. A trainee witch asks the Ninjas to find her a cat so she can pass her magic exam.
A Change is Gonna Come. Reality-style drama series. Alfie is back and the team is able to compete in the final. But when Michelle shows up, Riley has to make a hard decision.
The Movie Star. Gwen plots for movie star and Miss Grayling's cousin Lily Vernon to visit the school.
Best Day Ever. When her home visit is cancelled, Maisie takes her anger and frustration out on Erin's annual treasure hunt - until she learns why it's so important to Erin.
Episode 5. Stop-motion animation. Toast soldiers take to the skies in their toast-rack helicopter, and Maki and Iso ambush a suspicious Nigiri in a ninja sushi attack.
Spoilsport. Animated series. Shaun persuades Bitzer to take part in his game of cricket but Bitzer is more worried about the condition of the pitch than the game.
Bash Streets Back, Alright! On the first day of a new school year, Dennis and the gang imagine all the things that might be new and unfamiliar at Bash Street School.
The Merhaven Song Contest. The heroes quest to collect bath sponges from Merhaven, but Hoofius decides to enter the annual Merhaven Song Contest, causing mayhem in Merhaven.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Paperback Mountain. In order for Boy to fulfil his dream of becoming a Chosen Librarian, he and his siblings must complete the task of recovering a long-lost, overdue library book.
Dragons and Bears. Grizzy relaxes in the massage chair, but the electricity supply stops in the log cabin.
Security Guard. Duck is working overnight in a museum on his own. To keep him company, Duck makes a Frankenstein Frog, which soon runs rampage. It's up to Frog to save the day!
The Grill Is Gone. A gang of kids steal the Krusty Krab's grill.
Mummy Scares Best. The gang travels to Egypt, where a mummy is turning everyone into zombies.
Odd Way Round. Two strange villains team up to stop Orli from making it to her Odd Squad UK exam so that she will fail and be sent back to Niagara Falls.
Dude Relax! Beast Boy teaches Robin how to goof off and relax.
Taking the Next Steps. Diana arrives with new info about Terapagos and the Six Heroes.

programmes.show_name: Grizzy and the Lemmings: World Tour
programmes.show_description: Ready, Set, Bam! It's time for the racket game, where big scores mean big prizes.
A Tale of Two Trophies. Sixteen-year-olds Jun'ai and Luca play in the under-17 final against Charlton.
The Imprisoned Influencer Badge. Tilda teams up with an unlikely ally to contain the alien threat and keep her camp safe.
Brothers in Armorsaurs. A climactic battle reveals hidden truths.
Table Tennis Skills Masterclass. Abby is given a masterclass from the UK's youngest Paralympic table tennis medallist, Bly Twomey.
